d7076c31-f6c1-4f28-b2e8-15b95f5a3d6f.name: No Search Shortcut Icons
d7076c31-f6c1-4f28-b2e8-15b95f5a3d6f.description: Hides search shortcuts in the Zen browser URL bar, showing them only when the bar is focused.
d7076c31-f6c1-4f28-b2e8-15b95f5a3d6f.author: itsfaizankhan

ae7868dc-1fa1-469e-8b89-a5edf7ab1f24.name: Load Bar
ae7868dc-1fa1-469e-8b89-a5edf7ab1f24.description: Creates a sleek loading bar and mute status for single toolbar mode.
ae7868dc-1fa1-469e-8b89-a5edf7ab1f24.author: Tanay-Kar

a6335949-4465-4b71-926c-4a52d34bc9c0.name: Better Find Bar
a6335949-4465-4b71-926c-4a52d34bc9c0.description: Improves the find bar, making it floating, more responsive, and moving it to the top of the page.
a6335949-4465-4b71-926c-4a52d34bc9c0.author: RobotoSkunk

0c3d77bf-44fc-47a6-a183-39205dfa5f7e.name: Hidden Reset Button
0c3d77bf-44fc-47a6-a183-39205dfa5f7e.description: Hide the reset button behind the tab icon unless hovered.
0c3d77bf-44fc-47a6-a183-39205dfa5f7e.author: AlexCookieDev

253a3a74-0cc4-47b7-8b82-996a64f030d5.name: Floating History
253a3a74-0cc4-47b7-8b82-996a64f030d5.description: Detaches and moves a redesgined history sidebar to the left so that it appears to float and matches the zen aesthetic.
253a3a74-0cc4-47b7-8b82-996a64f030d5.author: ahmaadaziz

906c6915-5677-48ff-9bfc-096a02a72379.name: Floating Status Bar
906c6915-5677-48ff-9bfc-096a02a72379.description: Mod for Zen Browser that detaches the status bar from the bottom left corner of the browser window.
906c6915-5677-48ff-9bfc-096a02a72379.author: AmirhBeigi

6cd4bca9-f17d-4461-b554-844d69a4887c.name: Zen Minimal Exit Menu
6cd4bca9-f17d-4461-b554-844d69a4887c.description: A zen browser mod that changes the exit menu to 3 circles similar (but a bit different) to one in MacOS.
6cd4bca9-f17d-4461-b554-844d69a4887c.author: Dinno-DEV

1e86cf37-a127-4f24-b919-d265b5ce29a0.name: Cleaner Extension Menu

1e86cf37-a127-4f24-b919-d265b5ce29a0.author: KiKaraage

599a1599-e6ab-4749-ab22-de533860de2c.name: Pimp your PiP
599a1599-e6ab-4749-ab22-de533860de2c.description: Collection of tweaks and upgrades to PiP
599a1599-e6ab-4749-ab22-de533860de2c.author: shldk

87196c08-8ca1-4848-b13b-7ea41ee830e7.name: Tab Preview Enhanced
87196c08-8ca1-4848-b13b-7ea41ee830e7.description: Enhanced tab preview, respecting user background color and padding
